reviews.review_description: I don’t like it it’s boring nothing really to do in the game single player sucks ￼don’t waste your money on this game, but if you want a snowball fight game I recommend snow fortress it is way better

𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐭𝐫.𝐞𝐞/𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐨
Type this into any search engine, and claim the 𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭 to get 𝟐𝟓% off when purchasing (:

I’m going to keep this short considering I’m not too experienced in this game. Everything is good including the community, but due to low demand it is hard to find a server other than scheduled tournament times.

On the surface it does look like a good game. Assuming it gets better, I think this game has good potential, and ample reason to purchase.

developer_response.body: Hey @Astinio, thanks for trying out Snow Wars and for your review! We're working on improving players' experience so stay tuned for upcoming updates! Our great community is growing so soon this won't be an issue. We'd love to hear more what you'd like to see in the game so you're more than welcome to join our Discord server and let us know what you think. We appreciate your feedback!

reviews.review_description: In the tutorial, snowballs throw fine. While playing, they just drop to the ground in front of me. Very very frustrating.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that you have some problems, however, we did not encounter any of that. Maybe some internet connection? Could you please try again or share on our Discord or Community@actum.games a screen recording?

reviews.review_title: Fun with friends and easy game
reviews.review_description:
I picked up a copy for myself and then gifted one to a friend. This one is great and family friendly - my nieces and nephews I can see really enjoying this too! Excited to show them and have them play VR this way. 

The weapons are pretty easy to pickup and there is a good variety. Graphics are not hyper realistic, but this is a fun and easy to pick up snow game.

developer_response.body:
Hi thearecade 👋

Thanks for sharing the snowball love 😀 We really appreciate your positive feedback. If you ever want to chat or share more fun experiences, join our Snow Wars Discord: https://discord.gg/TMSBNTG36z

Best,
Actum Team

reviews.review_description:
The game works, but it is boring. The mechanics work as intended, but are not they are not the best designed mechanics. They feel clunky. The graphics are basic and fuzzy.  
The game has the best intentions, but it should not be on the main store. Maximum $10 for this.

developer_response.body:
Hi The_Richelieu 👋

Thank you for sharing your thoughts on Snow Man VR! We sincerely apologize for the delayed response; we've been focused on enhancing the game. Give the latest version a try - we believe you'll find it worth revisiting!

Regarding the comment about graphics being basic and fuzzy - it is worth noting that all the assets in the game have been made by our graphic designers with a great care.  We haven't received any reports about graphics being fuzzy.

For real-time updates and discussions, join our Discord community: https://discord.gg/TMSBNTG36z.

Appreciate your understanding,
Actum Games Team

reviews.review_description:
If you want to buy the game for 1/4 the price dm me.
Game is really fun.

This is really fun, i like it a lot! I think it is an amazing concept. 5 stars!


Important note to the devs:
I have three things that will majorly improve the game and seem within a simple achieving range and would be great to have on the next update soon.

1. Improve the throwing physics and make it more realistic. Because if you notice, in the game, throwing snow is a lot more realistic than throwing a snowball. Perhaps something that could be tweaked is making it feel more like you are throwing it and not the game.

2. Avatars would be cool. Just to tell someone apart from other people. (Including customizing your snowman, adding different winter accessories and gloves)

3. The settings need more options like turn angle, teleport mode, and perhaps some other options that give people the freedom to customize their game.

Those are the three things that are important for a game like this and not just my wants. But keep up the good work! It looks great so far! Looking forward to what kind of updates are coming!

developer_response.body:
WOW Thank you for an AMAZING review! Answering your questions:
1. We did it as is deliberately BUT we have good news for you - we plan to make it adjustable so you can select how you want to throw a snowball! Stay tuned

2. YES YES YES! New is coming, so stay tuned!

3. Since it's a shooter game, Teleport mode could be treated by someone as cheating, especially during multiplayer mode with other players. You can set up the turn angle in the Quest settings

Thank you again for this review as it keeps us motivated to work more on this title and we will not disappoint you!

reviews.review_description: If you love snow then this game is for you.  And if you like snowball fights - this game is a must have

developer_response.body: Thank you <3 We do our best and it's just the beginning - new is coming :)

reviews.review_description: Snow Wars VR is super cool! I like the graphics, shooting physics, and the variety of weapons. Thumbs up!

reviews.review_description: Please fix the multiplayer. Hard to join a lobby. And single player + tutorial confusing af

developer_response.body:
Hey 
Thank you for sharing your thoughts on Snow Wars. It's fantastic to hear that you appreciated the manually crafted assets that contribute to the game's visual appeal.

Concerning the multiplayer experience, we'd love to understand more about the challenges you encountered. Typically, players find themselves in a lobby upon launching the game, allowing for the creation of public or private servers. Your insights will help us enhance this aspect.

Feel free to join our Discord community at https://discord.gg/TMSBNTG36z  where you can directly engage with our developers.

Additionally, if you could provide more details about aspects of the single-player experience and tutorials that seemed confusing, it would be invaluable for our ongoing improvements.

Once again, we appreciate your valuable feedback as we work towards making Snow Wars an even more enjoyable experience

reviews.review_description: I can’t even play this game without people you need to update this game many have people that wants to play multiplayer the worst game ever😡😡😡

📈 @3⭐️ 2024.01.24

**Solid experience for all but Private games**

🔊 To be clear, my ratings and review are based on my use case which is “Safe place to game with my kids, simple and easy to use.”

🟢 This is a beautiful game that has made some very good improvements. It’s fun, simple, and has many good custom options to tweak your game environment. Plus the weapons are fun 😀

If you’re looking for a game to play online with strangers or solo, I encourage you to pick it up. Good community and an amazing group of very responsive devs who truly care about their product. 


🔴 There are some gaps in the private mode that are lacking and keep me & my family from playing this as often as we had hoped. Mainly:

- “Loading” still happens more than necessary and your private room will on rare occasions kick you out. 

- Private servers are non-persistent, meaning that I can create one, message it to my family, and have them join but the room doesn’t stay between games. You can’t exit a game mode back to your lobby with the same people unless you want to keep the settings and modes the same. You quite literally have to create the lobby and message a new code every time. It really makes the flow difficult. 

- ❓I haven’t verified if the initial loading lobby is safe & private or not. It wasn’t at the last update, but no one was online in my country when I logged in late last night. I’ll update when I’ve verified it one way or another.  



📈 @2⭐️
**Updated: Lobby Experience: not safe or private**

🤦🏼‍♂️ Oof. Good idea but rough execution. The lobby isn’t private. There isn’t a way to “opt out” or create a private one for your friends. You are quite literally at the mercy of whomever is logged in. 

This means that even the game at launch isn’t protected for minors. They are tossed into a lobby chat with whomever is online. 

I love the idea of a lobby, but not in its current form. It needs a bunch if work, safeguards, privacy options, etc. Hopefully future releases address this problem. 


📈 @3⭐️
**NOV 2023**

🍿 TLDR: Fun game with a cool concept, but not a $20 game yet. Not close. Needs some QoL improvements to close the gap with other multiplayer games of comparable pricing. Has potential, but I’d not spend more than $8-$9 in its current state.  


✅ POSITIVES
- Mechanics are decent
- amazing fun concept 
- variety of power ups and weapons are great
- solid discord community
- has private game mode so you can play with friends

🤔 NEUTRAL: stuff that’s personal preference 

- can’t customize snowman
- Tutorial can be vague & leave some things to the imagination. (See “storing snow”. If you pack it first it will not register and you can’t clear the tutorial)

❌ NEEDS WORK: Multi Player 
- each game requires you to recreate a game and send a code out. If you want to play a bunch of games with the same friends, you have to create them individually. TERRIBLE experience. Awful. Why not let us create a room and rotate the different game options through ( see walkabout mini golf multi player experience)

- you respawn in the same place mostly. So someone can just kill, camp, and wipe you out over and over.

- “teams” only. If you have 3 people wanting to play, it’s always 2-1. Why not let us have a “free for all” mode?


❌ NEEDS WORK: non-multi player
- you often pick up a weapon off the belt instead of extra snow or  power-ups. It’s too close

- no snow “quantity” alerts. You have to grab snow and listen to the different sounds to find out if you have “max snow”

- reloading certain guns require different snowpack. This isn’t immediately obvious and is only figured out by trial and error. (see shotgun vs snowgun).

developer_response.body:
Hi TheShadraq,

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts and experiences with Snow Wars. We genuinely appreciate your detailed feedback, as it helps us identify areas for improvement and make Snow Wars a better experience for everyone.

Let's dive into your points:

🔐 Lobby Privacy and Safety:
While we appreciate your feedback, it's essential to note that players do have the option to log in and create a private server for their group immediately. This feature allows for a more controlled and secure gaming environment for you and your friends.

Moreover, the ability to mute players provides an additional layer of control over your gaming experience, allowing you to manage interactions within the game more effectively.

⛄ Snowman Customization
 It's on our radar for future updates, so keep an eye out for upcoming announcements.

📖 Tutorial
We'll certainly check for any areas that can be improved. In essence, the tutorial aims to provide precise guidance on interactions. We've learned from experience that too many uncertainties can leave players confused, prompting questions on how to proceed.

❄️Storing snow
Snow quantity is numerically displayed on weapons, in the inventory, shop, and even on your hand.

🤼 Multiplayer
As mentioned, players can now create public servers or join currently active ones. 

Spawn points across the map are randomized, but we're aware of potential exploits. We're investigating this closely and actively seeking a solution.

Thanks for suggesting the Free for All mode – it's indeed a great idea! We've passed on this feedback to our developers.

... and thank you for flagging the issue of picking up weapons instead of extra snow or power-ups. We're currently investigating this and appreciate your patience. As we mentioned, checking snow quantity is possible in various places. Additionally, the unique aspect of Snow Wars is the abundance of snow everywhere, providing an unlimited resource.

Big thanks for your upbeat feedback! We're happy you're enjoying the game mechanics, concept, and the diverse power-ups/weapons. Your presence in our solid Discord community means a lot!

Best,
Actum Games Team

reviews.review_description: This stupid game had no server’s and when I tried to put on the mic it wouldn’t work

developer_response.body:
Hi eX_ca 👋

We're sorry to hear about the trouble you encountered with servers and the microphone in Snow Wars VR.

We've recently released an update with a new lobby that provides access to the entire map and weapons, allowing you to meet other players. You can also join our Discord (https://discord.gg/TMSBNTG36z) to coordinate with fellow gamers and enhance your multiplayer experience.

For microphone issues, please check your app permissions and ensure that the microphone is selected. In the game's main menu, navigate to audio settings to confirm that your microphone is unmuted.

We understand the frustration, and we genuinely appreciate your feedback. Give the game another shot with these updates, and we hope you'll find a more enjoyable and seamless experience.

Looking forward to having you back in the Snow Wars VR world! ❄️🎮 If you have any more questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out on Discord.

reviews.review_description: Not sure why everyone else’s experience was different mine. There are no servers active with players to even play it. It’s as if I’m your only person to buy this at least when I turn it on. Kind of let down. Not sure if I should wait for a fix or get my money back

developer_response.body: The servers are up and running :) Sometimes you can encounter not many people, so you can try single-player mode. Every week on Fri, Sat, Sun 6 PM we organize tournaments with many players - make sure to join and have fun :)

reviews.review_description: No one plays multiplayer but it is a good game overall.

hey Roofus99

reviews.review_description: The game is really fun but not for returning players. The game is fun when you first get it but when you’ve been playing it for a while it starts to get boring because all the updates give no reason for experienced players to come back to the game. Their is no customization or any reward for doing anything theirs no customization or any leveling system or any things that makes you want to achieve something.

developer_response.body:
Hey Aid_dough,

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts! We sincerely apologize for the delay in responding; we've been hard at work polishing Snow Wars VR since its launch.

We understand your desire for more engaging content for experienced players. We've actually rolled out several updates since the game's launch. While we can't promise specific features, we're actively listening to player feedback and working to enhance the overall experience.

A big thanks for being part of our Discord community at https://discord.gg/TMSBNTG36z Your presence means a lot to us. Your feedback is invaluable, and we're committed to making Snow Wars VR an even more thrilling adventure for returning players like you. ❄️🎮

If you have more insights or suggestions, we'd love to hear them!
